title: Updated weather warning: Heavy wind and rain
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South African Weather Service (SAWS) has issued an Orange level 5 and Yellow level 2 warning for damaging winds valid for Sunday, 27 October.


> "A Cut-off low is expected to result in westerly to north-westerly winds of 50 - 70 km/h while gusting 80 - 100 km/h over the Cape Winelands, Overberg, Garden Route and Central Karoo from Sunday afternoon into Monday morning (27 - 28 October)."


The warning further states that these winds will impact high-sided vehicles while also damaging settlements.

The winds are expected to moderate from the west from Monday afternoon.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
